description: Document in Arabic script. Likely a state report, or a letter with an official-looking layout (narrow column, with a large amount of space left in the margins). May mention Homs two lines from the bottom. Reused for a midrash on Bereshit.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
